name: Tofu Soup with Lemon Grass
recipeIngredient: 3 each Lemon grass stalks, cut into 3-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1 Cut tofu into 1/2-inch cubes. Cut mushrooms in half.
2 In a large pot, bring 6 cups of cold water to a rapid boil.
3 Add the A SEASONINGS and reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4 Remove any solid pieces of galanga, cilantro, lemon grass or kaffir lime that remain.
5 Add the tofu and mushrooms and simmer another 3 minutes.
6 Mix in the B SEASONINGS and heat through.
7 Transfer soup to a tureen and garnish.
8 To make the soup less hot, use milder chilies.
